markdownRemark.html:
The Warewulf project is pleased to announce the release of Warewulf v4.7.0, now available on GitHub.

Warewulf v4.7.0 is a feature release, with significant changes relative to the v4.6.x series.

  • Documentation audit
  • New wwctl unset command
  • Refactored server routes (URLs)
  • New /files/ route for serving individual files and templates
  • Server TLS support
  • Removed support for fetching individual overlays and individual files from overlays
  • Fixed whitespace handling around template functions
  • Security fixes, including updated Go and library versions

Significant changes are detailed in the release notes. Additional changes may be listed in the CHANGELOG.
